executives.name: Adam Selipsky
executives.background: Adam N. Selipsky was CEO of Amazon Web Services from May 2021 to June 2024. He previously served as President and CEO of Tableau Software.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director

executives.name: Keenan Conder
executives.background: Keenan Conder has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since September 2021. Prior to joining SentinelOne, Mr. Conder served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Tableau Software, Inc. from 2012 to 2021.

tenure_dates.title: EVP, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Scott Sandell
executives.background: Scott Sandell has served as a member of our board of directors since December 2012. Mr. Sandell is the Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and Chief Investment Officer of NEA, a venture capital firm.

tenure_dates.title: Member, Board of Directors / Lead Independent Director
